response.justification: Strong senior engineer with proven fundamentals in testing, architecture, and team leadership, but fundamentally misaligned for this C++ specialist role. The candidate's last professional C++ work was 11 years ago (National Instruments, 2014–2015); recent career moved entirely to TypeScript/Node.js full-stack development. Critical gaps include no message-broker or MQTT experience, no industrial automation or IoT platform background, and no knowledge of SDL/IEC 62443 security standards—all explicit or advantageous requirements for the position.
strengths: Demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals: proven TDD expertise, architecture design skills, and ability to mentor across diverse technical domains
Appropriate seniority level with multiple staff and senior roles showing cross-functional collaboration, ownership mindset, and technical leadership
Shows breadth and learning capacity across 20+ years including networking, real-time systems, and distributed platforms (data integration handling millions of requests/second)
concerns: No professional C++ development in 11+ years; career trajectory moved entirely away from C++ toward full-stack TypeScript/Node.js, indicating significant skill atrophy in the core requirement

Missing critical technical domains: no message-broker architecture, no MQTT protocol experience, no industrial automation or IoT platform development, and no exposure to industrial protocols (Modbus, IEC 61850, OPC UA)
No demonstrated knowledge of secure development lifecycle, IEC 62443 standards compliance, or industrial cybersecurity practices required for this role

key_factors.factor: C++ expertise gap (11+ year absence from professional role)
No industrial automation, IoT, or domain-specific knowledge
Senior-level software fundamentals and proven leadership
